chunks.text: Web services upgrade, Friday July 5 | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Web services upgrade, Friday July 5 IRIS-provided web services will be migrated to new Red Hat 9 servers on Friday, July 5th beginning

w Red Hat 9 servers on Friday, July 5th beginning at 10am. This will affect people.eecs, www2.eecs, and all the project websites hosted by IRIS. This should be transparent to most people, but users of apps.eecs.berkeley.edu might have to upgrade th

of apps.eecs.berkeley.edu might have to upgrade their code due to new versions of the supported languages. These people have been previously contacted. As usual, please send any questions or concerns to help@eecs.berkeley.edu. component Current Versi

to help@eecs.berkeley.edu. component Current Version Upgraded Version after July 5 apache 2.4.6 2.4.57 python 2.7.5 3.9.18 php 5.4.16 8.2.13 perl 5.16.3 5.32.1 [Update July 7, 8:40pm robm] The people.eecs and apps.eecs migrations were completed Frida

eecs and apps.eecs migrations were completed Friday by 12 noon. The www2.eecs migration was completed Sunday July 7 around 8:30pm. Primary Sidebar IRIS Service Status We have 0 Active Incidents, and 1 Scheduled Maintenance noted. IST Service Status O
